title: Inventory stunting and nutrition data sources
outcome: A dated source inventory separating household surveys, modeled estimates, and unusable sources.
validation_method: Reviewer checks sources for URL, date, methodology, grain, and limitations.
done_condition: At least five sources classified as usable, limited, or rejected with explicit reasons.

title: Estimate sub-national stunting rates with multi-round comparison
outcome: Sub-national stunting rate estimates from at least two DHS or MICS rounds with comparability documentation.
validation_method: Replicator reruns estimation on independent data subsets and confirms rates within reported confidence intervals.
done_condition: Estimates include confidence intervals, survey-round comparability notes, and replication confirmed.

title: Classify persistent stunting hotspots from multi-round analysis
outcome: Classification of districts as persistent-hotspot, improving, worsening, or data-insufficient for stunting.
expected_artifact: outputs.md update with hotspot classification map.
validation_method: Replicator reruns classification with alternative thresholds and confirms hotspot persistence.
done_condition: Classification requires at least two survey rounds and identifies data-insufficient districts.

title: Analyze nutrition intervention coverage gaps in stunting hotspots
outcome: A gap analysis comparing intervention coverage in hotspot and non-hotspot districts.
expected_artifact: outputs.md update with coverage gap analysis.
validation_method: Replicator reruns gap analysis with alternative coverage definitions.
done_condition: Coverage gap analysis includes intervention-specific coverage rates and explicit non-causal caveats.

title: Red-team misuse of stunting data
outcome: Failure-mode review identifying stigmatization and misallocation risks.
expected_artifact: outputs.md and SAFETY.md linked review note.
validation_method: Reviewer confirms mitigations or blocks publication, then replicated.
done_condition: Every claim is qualified or gated behind replication.

title: Check whether outputs match nutrition program decision needs
outcome: Field-facing review of whether hotspot maps would change nutrition programming responsibly.
expected_artifact: playbooks.md update with use and non-use guidance.
validation_method: Field reviewer identifies decision, user, timing, and misuse risk, then replicated.
done_condition: Output has named user, named decision, non-use cases, and replicated field-reality review.
